visual.title: Manage your leave processes from a single place
visual.subtitle: Employee requests, manager approvals, and leave balances in a secure, cloud-based system.

login.title: Log In
login.subtitle: Log in to your account to continue

register.title: Sign Up
register.subtitle: Create your employee account by entering your details
register.emailHint: This will be used to log in to the system
register.success: Registration successful, you can now log in

changePassword.title: Change Password

users.noUsers: No users registered in the system

users.resetPasswordSuccess: The user's password has been reset
users.resetBalanceSubtitle: {{name}}'s annual leave balance will be reset to {{count}} days. Do you confirm?

users.resetBalanceSuccess: The annual leave balance has been reset
users.deactivateSubtitle: {{name}}'s account will be deactivated and they will not be able to log in. Do you confirm?
users.activateSubtitle: {{name}}'s account will be reactivated. Do you confirm?
users.statusUpdateError: An error occurred while updating the status
users.deactivateSuccess: The user's account has been deactivated
users.activateSuccess: The user's account has been activated

manager.title: Leave Management
manager.cancelLeaveSubtitleAnnual: {{name}}'s approved leave will be cancelled and {{count}} days will be added back to their annual leave balance. Do you confirm?
manager.cancelLeaveSubtitleDaily: {{name}}'s approved leave will be cancelled. Do you confirm?
